_README: Global spoil/dump rates. Two billing models in play: weight-based ($/ton with cu_yd → ton conversion) for most pits, and minimum-flat-fee for Browns River. Per-destination overrides live under `dump_destinations`. Import (delivery of clean fill) is NOT a flat fee — it's material × truck hours, calculated per-quote in the Materials + Trucking buckets. Swell factor is NOT auto-applied — Michael accounts for swell in his notes when needed.

browns_river.name: Browns River Pit
browns_river.notes: $90 MINIMUM charge per dump trip — applies whether it's a small dump trailer load or a full tandem (10 cu_yd). Same $90 either way. Compute trips = ceil(spoil_cu_yd / 10); cost = trips × 90.

uplands.name: Upland's Gravel
uplands.notes: $10/ton (weight-based). Convert cu_yd → tons via 1.25 multiplier. Default model for central Vancouver Island jobs.
